title: KPI Threshold Settings
description: KPI Threshold Settings define the thresholds that a KPI uses to compute health status information. KPI Threshold Settings also contain information for rendering KPI threshold graphs.

attributes.name: gaugeMin
attributes.label: gaugeMin
attributes.description: Minimum value for the threshold gauge specified by user.

attributes.name: gaugeMax
attributes.label: gaugeMax
attributes.description: Maximum value for the threshold gauge specified by user.

attributes.name: search
attributes.label: search
attributes.description: Generated search used to compute the thresholds for this KPI.

attributes.name: baseSeverityValue
attributes.label: baseSeverityValue
attributes.description: Value for base threshold level.

attributes.name: baseSeverityColor
attributes.label: baseSeverityColor
attributes.description: Severity color assigned for the base threshold level.

attributes.name: baseSeverityColorLight
attributes.label: baseSeverityColorLight
attributes.description: Severity light color assigned for the base threshold level.

attributes.name: baseSeverityLabel
attributes.label: baseSeverityLabel
attributes.description: Severity label assigned for the base threshold level, including info, warning, critical, etc.

attributes.name: metricField
attributes.label: metricField
attributes.description: Thresholding field from the search.

attributes.name: renderBoundaryMin
attributes.label: renderBoundaryMin
attributes.description: Lower bound value to use to render the graph for the thresholds.

attributes.name: renderBoundaryMax
attributes.label: renderBoundaryMax
attributes.description: Upper bound value to use to render the graph for the thresholds.

attributes.name: isMaxStatic
attributes.label: isMaxStatic
attributes.description: True when maximum threshold value is a static value, false otherwise.

attributes.name: isMinStatic
attributes.label: isMinStatic
attributes.description: True when min threshold value is a static value, false otherwise.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
